provenance_note: Phase F / RRG-03 diagnosis-first preparation. NO real mutation executed. NO replay runner patch. NO schema patch. NO CI gate. The fixtures under fixtures/ describe a scenario that, if executed against a real working tree with real file I/O, could produce locator drift after partial apply. This run_meta documents only the fixture preparation and the make-validate baseline that confirms the additive diagnosis artifacts do not break existing validators. provenance_level is set to 'self_reported' because the run_meta schema only allows 'self_reported' or 'machine_verified'; the additional field 'provenance_intent: planned_fixture' makes the planning-only character explicit.
